name: POLITICO Policy Outlook: Powering 6G
notes: Telecom/tech policy briefing with Rep. Doris Matsui. In-person and virtual options. Relevant for tech-adjacent clients.

name: Agri-Pulse Ag & Food Policy Summit
notes: Full-day summit with House Ag Chair GT Thompson, Senate Ag Chair Boozman, Ranking Member Klobuchar. Followed by customer appreciation reception. Highly relevant for Albertsons/ACI farm bill and food policy work.

name: POLITICO Pub at CERAWeek
notes: Energy policy reception running March 22-25 alongside CERAWeek. Good energy sector networking.

name: Axios AI+ DC Summit
notes: Half-day AI summit with Rep. Kat Cammack. Mainstage 2:10-5pm, reception to 7pm. Relevant for NobleReach and tech-adjacent clients.

name: POLITICO's Economy Summit
notes: Economic policy summit. Relevant for Carta, Albertsons, and fintech clients.

name: POLITICO's Health Care Summit
notes: Annual health care summit. Highly relevant for Alliance for Care at Home client.
